empleos.descripcion: The salary range for this role is $1,500 - $4,000 per month (Gross in USD) About Sezzle: With a mission to financially empower the next generation, Sezzle is revolutionizing the shopping experience beyond payments, blending cutting-edge tech with seamless, interest-free installment plans that make shopping smarter and more accessible. We’re not just transforming payments; we’re redefining how people discover, interact with, and purchase the things they love while driving real impact on merchant sales through increased conversions and higher order values. As we continue to shape the future of fintech and retail, we’re building an innovative, dynamic team passionate about creating more than just a transaction but a truly unique shopping journey. If you’re excited about pushing boundaries in tech and delivering a game-changing experience for consumers and merchants alike, come join us at Sezzle and help create the future of shopping! About the Role: We are seeking a talented and motivated Junior Software Engineer with a unique blend of accounting experience who is best in class with a high IQ plus a high EQ. This role presents an exciting opportunity to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment within a rapidly growing team, with abundant prospects for career advancement. This role is tailored for professionals who started their careers in accounting but pivoted to engineering and now want to leverage their domain expertise to solve technical challenges in fintech. This role presents an exciting opportunity to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment within a rapidly growing team, with abundant prospects for career advancement. The role involves building and maintaining scalable web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and backend services. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in React.js and Node.js with a strong understanding of their ecosystems. • Experience with frontend technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6+). • Familiarity with backend frameworks like Express.js and database systems such as PostgreSQL or MongoDB. • Knowledge of version control systems, particularly Git, and CI/CD pipelines. • Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, Mocha) and debugging tools. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of mission-critical applications. empleos.descripcion: This is a 6-month engagement project. Location: Argentina or Colombia (candidates must reside in one of these two countries; the role is fully remote) Who We Are At MAS Global Consulting, we are a premium digital engineering partner trusted by innovative startups and Fortune 100 companies, delivering high-impact solutions through agile delivery, deep technical expertise, and a strong people-first culture across the Americas. We build long-term partnerships, not just software. MAS means “more” in Spanish, and that mindset drives our commitment to greater opportunity, inclusion, and impact. Founded by a Latina engineer from Medellín and headquartered in Tampa, Florida, MAS Global Consulting is a 100% Hispanic and woman-owned company, recognized as a Great Place to Work and one of the Fastest-Growing Companies in the US. Who You Are You are an experienced Senior Full Stack Engineer, comfortable working across the front end, backend, and cloud infrastructure. You have solid hands-on experience with React, Node.js, and C#, and you're used to owning features end to end in agile, collaborative environments. Engagement Details 6 Senior Full Stack Developer positions (contractors) Duration: 6 months Work mode: Remote Location requirement: Colombia or Argentina What You'll Do Build and maintain features across the full stack — from React front-end screens to Node.js and C# backend services. Design and implement data solutions using Postgres, AWS DynamoDB, and SQL. Develop and deploy infrastructure on AWS, including SQS, Lambda, ECS, CloudFront, ALB, and EventBridge. Manage infrastructure as code with Terraform, version-controlled through GitLab. Write and maintain automated tests using Jest and Playwright. empleos.descripcion: As the Full Stack Developer you will design and build software across the backend, frontend, and internal AI tooling for a growing product. You will contribute to technical decisions and collaborate closely with the team to deliver reliable, scalable solutions. This role is well suited for someone who is comfortable working with ambiguity and enjoys ownership over their work. empleos.descripcion: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Software Craftsperson (Node.js/React.js/AI) based in Argentina. This is a remote opportunity for a software engineer who is passionate about building high-quality, scalable, and maintainable systems. You will work in an AI-native development environment where modern tools enhance engineering practices without compromising craftsmanship. The role focuses on full-stack ownership, continuous improvement, and delivering meaningful solutions for diverse projects. You will collaborate closely with talented engineers, contribute to technical decisions, and work with a strong product mindset. The environment encourages autonomy, experimentation, and mastery of software development practices. If you enjoy solving complex problems, improving systems, and raising engineering standards, this role offers an opportunity to make a real impact. Accountabilities As a Software Craftsperson, you will take ownership of designing, developing, and improving production systems while following strong engineering principles. You will contribute across the full software development lifecycle, from understanding user needs to delivering reliable solutions. Build and maintain scalable full-stack applications using modern technologies, including Node.js, React.js, and AI-powered development tools. Apply software craftsmanship practices such as test-driven development, clean code principles, refactoring, and continuous delivery. Take end-to-end ownership of features, including front-end development, back-end services, infrastructure, and deployment processes. Participate in training sessions, on boarding activities, or team meetings as required. Adapt to new tools, software, and processes as the role evolves. What We Offer Competitive pay at $28 per hour for full-time work. 100 percent remote work environment. Paid training and on boarding provided. Consistent full-time work schedule. motivos: ✓ Tu stack: React, Front End, JavaScript, Git
empleos.descripcion: We are looking for a highly skilled Front-End Engineer with strong expertise in React and Next.js to build and maintain enterprise-grade web applications. The ideal candidate has experience developing scalable, data-intensive platforms, understands how front-end applications interact with APIs and authentication systems, and is comfortable working in a fully remote, English-speaking environment. Proven experience with Next.js, including SSR, CSR, routing, and environment-based configurations. Experience consuming secure REST APIs using JWT, OAuth, or similar authentication methods. Strong understanding of RBAC and authorization concepts. Experience optimizing front-end performance and working with large datasets. Proficiency with Git workflows, pull requests, and code reviews. Strong English communication skills (written and verbal). Ability to work independently while maintaining visibility and accountability in a remote environment. Nice to Have Experience with AG Grid Enterprise or similar data-grid solutions. GraphQL experience. Experience with Azure AD / Entra ID. Background in SaaS, multi-tenant applications, financial systems, analytics, or data visualization platforms.

empleos.titulo: Software Developer Front End Payments - Personal Pay

empleos.descripcion: Ubicación AR Descripción Quienes Somos Somos Personal, una empresa que acompaña y potencia la vida de las personas a través de la tecnología. Nuestra propuesta está pensada para que cada persona, comunidad y organización pueda avanzar, conectarse, disfrutar y transformar su realidad. En Personal Pay estamos sumando un/una Developer Frontend Sr para el equipo de Payments con pasión por la innovación, ganas de ser protagonistas y facilidad para el desempeño en un entorno desafiante y dinámico. Buscamos Protagonistas Que Se Animen a ✔️ Trabajar en un equipo autónomo formado por diversos roles con los que interactuar para cumplir los objetivos. ✔️ Desempeñarse en un entorno ágil utilizando las últimas metodologías. ✔️ Construir funcionalidades, trabajando en el diseño de las mismas de manera integral con tu equipo. ✔️ Interactuar directamente con los equipos de diseño de UX para implementar una gran experiencia de usuario. ✔️ Participar del análisis técnico de la solución y en las decisiones técnicas de las mismas junto a los diferentes referentes de cada área implicada. ✔️ Interactuar con diferentes equipos dentro de la organización. Y Cuenten Con Estas Experiencias y Habilidades ✔️ Que sientas curiosidad por el mundo fintech. ✔️ Que te apasione el desafío de crear productos de cero y proponer las mejores soluciones. ✔️ 5+ años de experiencia previa en desarrollo de Software. ✔️ 3+ años de experiencia en el desarrollo de aplicaciones web y/o móviles con React Native (excluyente) ✔️ 2+ años de experiencia trabajando en equipo con arquitecturas distribuidas. ✔️ Es un plus poseer experiencia trabajando con TypeScript, NodeJS y NestJS para la construcción de APIs. ✔️ Que desarrolles usando patrones diseño y sigas buenas prácticas de programación. ✔️ Conocimientos de unit testi

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: Node.js, TypeScript, Full Stack, Front End, Back End
empleos.descripcion: Buscamos un desarrollador Fullstack Senior (Node.js + Angular) para empresa líder en fintech. Importante: Posición remota pero deben residir en Córdoba o Buenos Aires (con facilidad para ir a las oficinas y tener encuentros presenciales por cuatrimestre) Tecnologías clave: Node.js, Angular, AWS (EKS/Lambda) ¿Qué desafío te espera? Buscamos a una persona apasionada por la arquitectura y el desarrollo de software, con un enfoque fullstack senior, para sumarse a un equipo que construye soluciones escalables de alto impacto. Más allá de tirar código, buscamos a un referente técnico hands-on: alguien con la autonomía necesaria para tomar decisiones de arquitectura, proponer mejoras y garantizar la robustez del producto. Vas a trabajar en una infraestructura moderna basada en AWS, colaborando directamente con producto, UX, proveedores y negocio, siendo el dueño técnico de tus desarrollos. Stack tecnológico Backend: Node.js (Fastify), API REST, arquitecturas orientadas a eventos y seguridad avanzada. Frontend: Angular (últimas versiones), TypeScript, RxJS, SCSS. Cloud: AWS (Expertise en EKS, Lambda, ECS, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3, Cloudfront, CloudWatch). Testing: Foco en calidad con Jest y Cypress. Requisitos +6 años de experiencia real como desarrollador/a fullstack en entornos complejos. Sólidos conocimientos y autonomía en Node.js y Angular de forma principal. Experiencia avanzada diseñando e integrando APIs REST y servicios en la nube (AWS es excluyente para este seniority). Criterio técnico: maestría en buenas prácticas, clean code y patrones de diseño. Capacidad de análisis: entendimiento funcional para traducir necesidades de negocio en soluciones técnicas eficientes. Excelente comunicación y capacidad para canalizar soluciones dentro del equipo.

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: Front End, React, Tailwind, JavaScript
empleos.descripcion: Mindrift is looking for skilled Frontend Developers (HTML/CSS/JavaScript, React/Next.js) to join the Tendem project (https://tendem.ai/) and build high-quality landing pages and multi-page websites within our hybrid AI + human environment. In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this position at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide frontend craftsmanship, design sensibility, and quality control to ensure pixel-perfect, conversion-ready websites that match real client briefs. This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for professionals with hands-on experience in landing page production, multi-page website development, and modern frontend frameworks. What We Do The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe. About The Role This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Frontend Developer, you'll design, build, and refine landing pages, waitlist pages, promo pages, and small multi-page sites (portfolios, restaurant sites, small business sites, simple online stores), turning client briefs into responsive, performant, polished web experiences. Key Responsibilities Build landing pages, waitlist pages, and promo pages with clear hero sections, CTAs, and conversion-focused layouts Build small multi-page websites (Home, About, Services, Contact, etc.) that follow client requirements and basic information architecture Implement responsive, mobile-first layouts that work cleanly across devices and browsers Integrate forms, email capture, basic analytics, and simple CMS or headless content sources Apply on-page SEO basics (semantic HTML, meta tags, p

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: TypeScript, JavaScript, Full Stack, Back End
empleos.descripcion: About The Role What if the code you write could directly shape how the next generation of AI understands and generates software? We're looking for Software Engineers in Buenos Aires to build, evaluate, and improve AI-generated code — helping train AI systems to think like real developers. You'll write solutions, review AI outputs, and provide the expert-level feedback that makes AI coding assistants smarter, safer, and more reliable. This is hands-on engineering work at the frontier of AI development — not theoretical, not bureaucratic, and not boring. This is a fully remote, flexible contract role. If you can write clean code and explain your reasoning, we want to hear from you. Organization: Alignerr Type: Hourly Contract Location: Remote Commitment: 10–40 hours/week What You'll Do Write, debug, and optimize code across a range of languages, frameworks, and problem domains Review and evaluate AI-generated code for correctness, efficiency, readability, and best practices Identify bugs, logic errors, security issues, and performance bottlenecks in AI outputs Provide structured, detailed feedback explaining why code works — or doesn't Design challenging coding prompts and edge-case scenarios to stress-test AI capabilities Compare and rank multiple AI-generated solutions based on engineering quality Work independently and asynchronously — fully on your own schedule Who You Are Proficient in one or more programming languages (Python, JavaScript, Java, C++, Go, TypeScript, or similar) Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and software design principles Able to read, write, and reason about code with clarity and precision Strong problem-solving instincts and a systematic debugging approach Clear written communicator — you can explain technical decisions in plai

empleos.descripcion: We are hiring in Latin America! 🟢 Dev.Pro is a global team of IT professionals helping tech companies scale their business through software engineering expertise. Operating as a remote-first company, our developers work across 55+ countries on five continents, giving us the flexibility and skillset to deliver high-quality engineering for projects of any size or complexity. Clear communication and following through on our commitments are at the core of how we work. Our people have the freedom to work from anywhere, along with the opportunity to grow — both professionally and personally — as part of a diverse, dedicated team. We invite an Intermediate Software Engineer to join our team responsible for integration services within a large payroll and HR platform supporting the entire employee lifecycle. In this role, you'll work on integration projects, support existing services, and have the opportunity to contribute to the platform's upcoming migration to MuleSoft. 🟩 What's in it for you: Work with a recognized leader in the payroll and HR solutions industry Grow your MuleSoft skills while contributing to a major platform modernization initiative Join a team that actively invests in engineers' growth through mentoring, personalized learning plans, and training ✅ Is that you? 2+ years of commercial software development experience Strong understanding of object-oriented programming (OOP) Experience building APIs, integrations, or backend services Ability to read and understand existing Node.js code Interest in MuleSoft demonstrated through coursework, certifications, or personal coding projects Knowledge of NoSQL databases, preferably MongoDB Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills Excellent communication and collaboration skills Curiosity and willing

About us At HelpBnk, we donât just build software; we build infrastructure for a future where everyone has the agency to follow their dreams. Co-founded by Simon Squibb, we are on a mission to Free Humanity from the trap of unfulfilling work and the looming challenges of AI-driven automation. We are a high-growth startup under the Dream Inc umbrella, creating a social platform and business-starting tools that empower people to take control of their lives. If you are tired of "just a job" and want to fight for something that matters, read on. Our Culture Ownership. We're small, so there's a lot of open ground. If you spot something broken, you're the one who gets to fix it. That's the good part and the hard part. Openness. Problems get named early, including our own. We'd rather have an uncomfortable conversation on Monday than a bad quarter. AI as a tool . We build with agentic AI (Claude Code, Cursor, and whatever comes next). We're not looking for people who let it write the code unsupervised, or for people who won't touch it. We're looking for people who've worked out where it helps and where it lies to you. Interesting problems . The work here is genuinely unsolved in places. If you like that, you'll like it here. If you'd rather have a well-defined roadmap and a clear spec, we're probably not the right fit for eachother. The Challenge We are in a pivotal phase of our journey. HelpBnk is transitioning its mobile experience from a web to a full native React Native application. Simultaneously, we are revamping our UX. As a Senior Engineer, you will have a massive impact on the future of our mobile development as we expand into new countries and verticals. What Youâll Do Lead the Transition: Architect and build high-performance, scalable mobile applications from th

empleos.titulo: Ingeniero de Software - Next.js + NestJS + AI
empleos.descripcion: 🚀 Sobre Nosotros Estamos creando la nueva era comunicacional de la hotelería. Y queremos que seas parte. Somos WeSpeak, una startup que está re-inventando la venta hotelera con asistentes virtuales de Inteligencia Artificial para WhatsApp. Nuestra tecnología de inteligencia artificial conversa con huéspedes en tiempo real y transforma la forma en que los hoteles se comunican con sus clientes y venden de forma directa para depender menos de plataformas como Booking.com. Ya ayudamos a más de 500 hoteles en 20 países a convertir más consultas en reservas, 24/7, con el tono humano que la hospitalidad merece. Crecemos porque amamos lo que hacemos, somos profesionales y tenemos un foco absoluto y tenemos un equipo brutal. Si buscas estabilidad o comodidad, este puesto no sea para vos. Pero si queres crecer como profesional, desafiarte y aprender a ejecutar a velocidad startup, este es tu lugar. 🟣 ¿Por qué es importante este rol? En WeSpeak estamos en una etapa de evolución técnica donde la velocidad es importante, pero la arquitectura correcta es crítica. Buscamos un/a Software Engineer (Senior / Semi-Senior) con fuerte dominio del ecosistema moderno de JavaScript, que no solo desarrolle funcionalidades, sino que participe activamente en decisiones de arquitectura, diseño de sistemas y escalabilidad del producto. Este rol es clave para: Diseñar soluciones sólidas y mantenibles. Tomar decisiones técnicas con visión de largo plazo. Elevar el estándar de ingeniería del equipo. Construir una base tecnológica escalable. Es un perfil con mentalidad de ingeniería, no solo de ejecución. 🟣 Responsabilidades principales Pilar 1: Arquitectura y diseño de soluciones Este pilar responde a: asegurar que lo que construimos hoy siga funcionando mañana. Diseñar arquitectura de nuevas funciona

Our professionals come first and are the most important part of our team. As we continue to grow, we are expanding our team. If you want to be part of a company that values work-life balance and supports your professional development, you're in the right place. Our Core Values Put our Talent first Pursuit of excellence/continuous learning Integrity and transparency Ownership mentality Pursuit of growth Excellent attitude Job Description: The AI Software Developer designs, builds, and ships internal applications that streamline operations, reduce software licensing costs, and scale with business growth. Using AI-assisted development tools (Replit, Claude Code, Copilot), you'll rapidly prototype and deliver production-ready tools that replace selected third-party software and manual workflows. This role combines hands-on engineering with a product mindset, turning business problems into working software quickly, securely, and cost-effectively. Key Responsibilities Build, ship, and maintain internal web applications using AI-assisted development environments, translating business requirements into working software quickly while maintaining reliability and security standards Partner with leadership to identify high-cost or underused software that can be replaced with purpose-built internal tools, and estimate cost savings delivered by each replacement project Write clean, documented, and maintainable code following source control and deployment best practices; apply security and data protection standard

We are currently hiring for a full-time remote position open exclusively to candidates based in the United States. This is a stable work-from-home opportunity within a professional, structured, and supportive team environment. Position Type: Full-Time (Remote) Location: United States only Pay Rate: $28 per hour No prior experience is required. Paid training will be provided. We are looking for dependable individuals with a positive attitude, strong work ethic, and a willingness to learn. Requirements Must be legally authorized to work in the United States. Must have access to a reliable computer or laptop. Must have a stable and reliable internet connection. Basic computer skills are required, including typing, email usage, and file management. Strong attention to detail and accuracy. Good written and verbal communication skills. Ability to work independently with minimal supervision. Must have a quiet and distraction-free workspace. Key Responsibilities Perform assigned tasks accurately and efficiently on a daily basis. Enter, manage, and maintain data, records, or communications as required. Follow written instructions, company guidelines, and internal procedures carefully. Communicate professionally with internal teams or external contacts when necessary. Manage time effectively while working independently in a remote environment. Maintain confidentiality, data security, and data integrity at all times. Participate in training sessions, onboarding activities, or team meetings as required. Adapt to new tools, software, and processes as the role evolves. What We Offer Competitive pay at $28 per hour for full-time work. 100 percent remote work environment. Paid training and onboarding provided. Consistent full-time work schedule. Opportunities for growth and advancement

AWS Partner Premier con 11 años de experiencia en mercados de servicios financieros, logística, salud y entretenimiento en Uruguay, Perú, Argentina, Colombia y Ecuador. Contamos con +500 proyectos lanzados en AWS, facilitando mejoras notables en sectores como Educación, Entretenimiento, Logística, Salud, Sector Público y Financiero mediante DevOps & SRE, AWS Cloud, GIS, Migration & Modernization, Optimization, Governance, IA/ML Data, y Development. Serás responsable del diseño e implementación de requerimientosen diversos proyectos para distintos clientes, trabajando con tecnologías como Java, Node.js, Angular, React y Python. Contribute domain-specific expertise to guide the training and development of advanced AI models. We’re not just transforming payments; we’re redefining how people discover, interact with, and purchase the things they love while driving real impact on merchant sales through increased conversions and higher order values. As we continue to shape the future of fintech and retail, we’re building an innovative, dynamic team passionate about creating more than just a transaction but a truly unique shopping journey. If you’re excited about pushing boundaries in tech and delivering a game-changing experience for consumers and merchants alike, come join us at Sezzle and help create the future of shopping! Compensation: For this mid-level development role, with 3-7 years of experience, the compensation range is $2,800 - $6,000 USD per month. This range is designed to reflect the skills, experience, and value brought to the team, ensuring competitive and fair pay within the industry. Interview Process We believe transparency is important at Sezzle. Regularly providing feedback while setting expectations is part of our culture starting with the interview process. Advancement through each step is not guaranteed.
